entries.title: Google Rebuilds Search Around AI After 25 Years
entries.summary: Every product search, price check and restaurant booking has started the same way since 1998: Type something short, get a list of links. That model is 25 years old. On Tuesday (May 19), Google announced it’s done with it. At its I/O developer conference in Mountain View, Google unveiled what it called the biggest […] The post Google Rebuilds Search Around AI After 25 Years appeared first on

entries.title: AI Targets Trucking’s $15 Billion Breakdown Problem
entries.summary: When a truck breaks down on the highway, the repair bill is the smallest part of the problem. The delivery is late, the driver is stranded, the tow costs more than the fix and the customer is calling. The American Transportation Research Institute puts the industrywide toll at more than $25 billion annually in […] The post AI Targets Trucking’s $15 Billion Breakdown Problem appeared first on

entries.title: Commure Secures $70 Million to Expand AI Healthcare Operations Platform
entries.summary: Healthcare artificial intelligence (AI) company Commure announced Tuesday (May 19) that it has raised $70 million in new financing, achieving a post-money valuation of $7 billion. The Mountain View, California-based company said in a press release that the funding round was led by General Catalyst, with additional participation from Sequoia Capital, Morgan Stanley and Kirkland […] The post C

entries.title: Andrej Karpathy Lands at Anthropic Amid AI Research Arms Race
entries.summary: Andrej Karpathy joined Anthropic, marking one of the highest-profile talent moves yet in the escalating competition among frontier artificial intelligence labs for elite research talent. Karpathy, a founding member of OpenAI and head of AI at Tesla, said he would join Anthropic’s pretraining team focused on advancing large language model research, according to Bloomberg. entries.title: PayPal partners with Anthropic to close the AI fap for small businesses
entries.summary: Eighty-two percent of small businesses surveyed say adopting AI is essential to staying competitive, but seventy-three percent say they don’t have the tools or training to do it. PayPal is partnering with Anthropic to close that gap.

entries.title: TradeStation unveils Insights AI
entries.summary: TradeStation Group, Inc. (“TradeStation Group”), parent company of TradeStation Securities, Inc., the brokerage firm built for active equity and derivatives traders, today announced the launch of Insights AI, a proprietary AI–powered tool designed to enhance market analysis for active traders.

entries.title: AI WealthTech Moment raises $78 million
entries.summary: Moment, the AI operating system for investment management, has raised $78 million in a Series C funding round led by Index Ventures, with participation from Andreessen Horowitz, Avra, and other existing investors.

entries.title: Deutsche Bank applies AI to third party vendor risks
entries.summary: Deutsche Bank is using artifical intelligence to speed up the tedious, time-consuming, process of reviewing third party vendor risks.

entries.title: AI crosses strucutural threshold for banks - Accenture
entries.summary: Artificial intelligence has crossed a quiet but consequential threshold in UK financial services, becoming operationally critical to how core processes now function.

entries.summary: Speaking to FinextraTV at NextGen Nordics 2026 in Stockholm, Andre Zimmerman, head of pre-sale, Coconet discussed the complex considerations within SME treasury management. entries.title: Compliance firm Eisen secures $18.5 million in funding
entries.summary: Eisen, the AI-enabled compliance operations infrastructure for financial services, today announced $18.5 million in funding, including a $10 million Series A led by MissionOG and a previously unannounced $8.5 million seed round led by Index Ventures, with participation from Cowboy Ventures, First Round Capital, Homebrew, and Restive Ventures.

entries.title: Klarna teams with Worldline for instore and online payments
entries.summary: Worldline [Euronext: WLN], a European leader in payment services, and Klarna, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, have announced the signing of a framework agreement to improve access to Klarna’s full suite of flexible payments across online and in-store points of sale serviced by Worldline.

entries.title: CommBank appoints Professor Mary-Anne Williams as its first chief AI scientist
entries.summary: Commonwealth Bank (CommBank) has appointed Professor Mary-Anne Williams as its first Chief AI Scientist following an extensive global search.

entries.title: TSB reports spike in impersonation scams
entries.summary: TSB is warning of a surge in impersonation scams as cases in the first quarter of this year have surpassed those recorded for full-year 2025, with the value of losses 116 percent higher.
